title: 2025-11-14 — Friday
content:
## Priorities
- [ ] Set up knowledge base template
- [ ] Review and tag existing notes
- [ ] Plan weekend reading list

## Log
- 09:00 — Morning coffee, reviewed goals for the week
- 10:30 — Started building the knowledge base
- 14:00 — Deep work session on template design
- 16:00 — Wrapped up, linked notes together

## Reflections
Productive day. The single-entity approach for the knowledge base feels right — keeps things simple while being flexible enough for any note type. Looking forward to seeing the graph of linked notes grow.
summary: Set up knowledge base, deep work on template design. Good day.
